# Vendored MuJoCo Models

This directory is a tracked copy of the UR5e and UR10e model folders from the
local `mujoco_menagerie/` checkout.

Only the UR5e and UR10e subtrees are mirrored here so they can be published
through the main `real_Cartpole` repository remote.

Source checkout:
- `mujoco_menagerie/universal_robots_ur5e`
- `mujoco_menagerie/universal_robots_ur10e`

The nested `mujoco_menagerie/` repository remains present for local reference,
but this `vendor/` copy is the tracked publishable version.
